stemHtml: A pilot loses situational awareness during a flight and requests a QDM from ATC. The reply is “QDM 110° Class A”. Which of the following is correct regarding the reply from ATC?

options.a: Magnetic track from the station is between 108° and 112° magnetic.
options.b: Magnetic track to the station is between 108° and 112° magnetic.
options.c: True bearing to the station is exactly 110°.
